eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Dolores, CO; at 8:14 PM on JUL 1, 2026 Effective until 9:14 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: ZONE 8 CHANGING TO SET STATUS DOLORES CANYON TO CR 15 AND CR H.6 TO CR P.
